---
title: "Julia Clara Byrne"
---

## Julia Clara Byrne

**Dates:** (1819-1894)

**Maiden name:** (Busk)

### Description

writer

### Biography

Wife of the proprietor of the <i>Morning Post</i>, travel writer, sister of Rachel Busk, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1871). [ODNB]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
